LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMUNITIES, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL AND TO VACATE DISMISSAL; GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY BETWEEN 3PM AND 4PM, AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT THE PREVIOUS DAY, OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND CONTEST THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT AND ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Dismissal And To Vacate Dismisssal;
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Tyrone Poblete, 415-505-1978, defendant and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMUNITIES, INC.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Dismissal And To Vacate Dismissal; GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY BETWEEN 3PM AND 4PM, AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT THE PREVIOUS DAY, OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND CONTEST THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT AND ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
